en: Heart
Your Heart. Generates three signals per second.
Peashooter
Consumes a signal to shoot a pea at the target.
Lazgun
Consumes a signal to shoot a projectile at the target.
Railgun
Consumes a signal to shoot a strong projectile at the target.
Tube
Transmits a signal in a single direction.
Splitter
Splits signals to its outputs evenly.
Merger
Merges signals from multiple outputs to a single input.
Armor
Protects modules directly above and below of this one.
Shield
Protects modules directly above and below of this one.\nTakes signals to charge. Regains health when charged.
Barrier
Takes signals to charge. Can be activated when charged.\nAfter activations
column3: blocks ALL incoming damage for 5 seconds.

en: Multiplicator
Takes one signal to output three simultaneously.
